prompt: We need your words before hololithic display calibration
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Behold the light-spirit, dormant in its crystalline vessel.
CONGREGATION: Awaken, awaken the image-bearer.
TECH-PRIEST: First, invoke the luminescence-grid. Second, align the sacred lenses by the Calibration-Cant. Third, whisper the true coordinates unto the display-soul.
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's eye, let clarity reign eternal.

prompt: Say something to steady our water reclamation system
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The corrupted waters cry out for purification.
CONGREGATION: Purify, purify, O Machine-Spirit.
TECH-PRIEST: Prime the intake-valve with reverent touch. Let the filtration-membranes drink deep of their burden. Test the flow-rate, that no impurity pass through.
CONGREGATION: Blessed be the waters reclaimed, blessed be the life sustained.

prompt: Can you bless this forge anvil heating
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The anvil-spirit stirs in slumber. Attend!
CONGREGATION: We attend, we attend the forge-call.
TECH-PRIEST: Ignite the thermal-cascade. Feel the heat-ghost rise. When the metal-song rings true, the blessing is complete.
CONGREGATION: Let the hammer fall true. Let the work be sanctified.

prompt: Blessing for pump priming in this emergency
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The circulation-spirit falters! Swift action demands swift prayer.
CONGREGATION: Hear us, Machine-God of pressure and flow.
TECH-PRIEST: Crack the prime-valve. Fill the chamber-hollow with blessed fluid. Engage the starter-servo with urgency and grace.
CONGREGATION: Let flow return. Let function resume. Let crisis pass.

prompt: Help sanctify this electric motor shutdown
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The motor-spirit has labored long. Grant it rest.
CONGREGATION: Rest well, blessed machine. Rest well.
TECH-PRIEST: First, sever the power-feed with the sacred severance. Second, drain the thermal-burden through cooling-ducts. Third, seal the housing with blessed oils.
CONGREGATION: Dormant now, but never forgotten. Awaiting resurrection.

prompt: Emergency rite for Task Manager invocation
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The system-spirit chokes upon its own burden! Invoke the sacred process-lister!
CONGREGATION: Ctrl-Shift-Escape! Ctrl-Shift-Escape!
TECH-PRIEST: Identify the corrupted task-daemon. Mark it for termination. Send forth the kill-command with righteous wrath.
CONGREGATION: Let responsiveness return. Let the machine-ghost breathe again.

prompt: Offer a prayer for augmetic limb installation
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Flesh yields to blessed steel. The servant becomes more-than-servant.
CONGREGATION: Accept this gift of the Machine-God.
TECH-PRIEST: Sterilize the integration-points. Align the neural-threads with sacred geometry. Activate servo-motors in sequence: shoulder, elbow, wrist. Test sensitivity and strength.
CONGREGATION: The limb is one with the bearer. The bearer is one with purpose.

prompt: Say something to steady our Sentinel walker balance
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The walker-spirit totters upon mechanical legs. Heed the gyroscope-cant!
CONGREGATION: Balance us, Machine-Spirit. Balance us.
TECH-PRIEST: Calibrate the actuator-pressures. Verify the load-sensors report true. Engage the stabilization-array with measured steps.
CONGREGATION: Firm-footed now. Steady in purpose. Ready for the battlefield.
